description_long: This helmet features a vibrant orange color with white racing stripes running from front to back, giving it a sporty appearance. The front is equipped with large, white-rimmed goggles that are integrated into the helmet's design, providing both protection and a retro aesthetic. The sides display metallic rivets securing a white band that wraps around the helmet, adding structural detail and visual contrast. On the left side, there is a circular emblem with a stylized character or mascot, enhancing its unique identity. The lower section of the helmet is padded and extends to cover the ears, with a brown chin strap and buckle for secure fastening. Decorative geometric patterns and symbols in white are present along the back and sides, contributing to the helmet's distinctive and playful look.
description: A bright orange helmet with white racing stripes, integrated goggles, and decorative white patterns, featuring a side emblem and a secure chin strap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the integrated white-rimmed goggles, central white stripes, and the padded chin strap hanging below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the metallic rivets, white band, and the start of the geometric patterns along the lower edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the white stripes, geometric symbols, and the back of the chin strap.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the circular emblem with a character, more rivets, and the continuation of the white band and patterns.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular emblem with a stylized character is present on the right side of the helmet, featuring a cartoon-like face and text, but no recognizable commercial brand.
attribute_graphic_design: Orange base with white racing stripes, geometric patterns, and a circular character emblem; playful and sporty visual style.
